description: Northwood ERP showcase overview — skeleton wired in §1D.0, filled in by §1D.5.

options.content:
## Northwood ERP — Observability

This dashboard is the **skeleton** wired in §1D.0 — the curated three-row board (service health, bus health, place-an-order trace drill-down) lands in §1D.5.

**Datasources wired** (Configuration → Data sources to verify):
- Prometheus — `http://prometheus:9090` (metrics; targets stay red until §1D.1)
- Tempo — `http://tempo:3200` (traces; arrives in §1D.1 + §1D.2)
- Loki — `http://loki:3100` (logs; arrives in §1D.1)
- Northwood-Postgres — direct SQL read of `audit_entry` + `outbox`

**Explore** → pick Tempo → search service `sales-service`. Empty until services are running with §1D.1 instrumentation, then a placed order traces through sales → inventory → manufacturing → finance.

title: Northwood — Overview (skeleton)
